title: Masala Chaas
description: A cooling yogurt-based buttermilk flavored with roasted cumin, ginger, mint, and cilantro.
steps: Adjust salt and water to your preferred consistency.
Serve chilled with a sprinkle of roasted cumin.
notes: Freshly whisked yogurt produces the creamiest chaas.
For a Gujarati-style version, omit the chili and add a pinch of sugar.
